quality_highlights: audit command has comprehensive help text with many URL format examples
memoryops.md is exceptionally well-structured with practical patterns and code examples
docker_validation_graceful_test.go test code is clear and well-documented

single_file_improvements.issue: Run messages use playful hawk military theme ('Hawk down!', 'skies grow quiet', 'Intel delivered') which is casual and thematic rather than professional/informative for enterprise users
Best Practices section is a single dense run-on paragraph; would benefit from a structured bullet list for scannability
